headline: Tempus AI Stock Gains Following the ALERT Trial Result Announcement
summary: TEM jumps after ALERT trial shows EHR alerts boost timely valve care, improving evaluations and interventions for aortic stenosis and MR patients.

headline: A new valve, a new playbook: How Anteris is trying to reshape a $10B heart market
summary: Cardiovascular disease may be one of medicine’s oldest battlegrounds, but some of its most important technologies are still evolving — and not always as quickly as patients, and investors, might expect. Nowhere is that more evident than in transcatheter aortic valve replacement (TAVR), a...
